headline: Databricks enters the CDP market with CustomerLake and agentic identity resolution
for_amperity: A partner platform is now building identity resolution into the lakehouse itself, with HP, Circle K, and AB InBev already in private preview.
posture: Might be worth getting ahead of this with a calm coexistence line, before the story gets told for us.

cluster.title: Databricks enters marketing industry with CustomerLake, agentic customer data platform
Databricks launches an agentic challenger to traditional CDPs

headline: Snowflake details native identity resolution with four matching passes
for_amperity: Snowflake now resolves first party and partner identities in-platform, with LiveRamp, Experian, Acxiom, and TransUnion graphs as native apps.
posture: A public benchmark of our match accuracy could help here, since the moat only counts if buyers can see it.

cluster.title: Snowflake: one platform for first-party and partner identity resolution

headline: Snowflake commits 6 billion dollars to AWS for agentic AI compute
for_amperity: Its largest infrastructure deal ever signals where the enterprise data gravity and the agent workloads will sit for the next five years.
posture: Probably worth keeping our Snowflake alignment visible in the field while they invest in this direction.

cluster.title: Snowflake expands AWS collaboration with $6B commitment to accelerate enterprise agentic AI adoption
Snowflake expands AWS collaboration

headline: Hightouch ships Lifecycle Studio, agentic campaigns promptable from Claude
for_amperity: The composable side now sells finished agentic marketing workflows on top of the warehouse, not just pipes.
posture: A good moment to gently remind the market that agents are only as good as the identity underneath them.

cluster.title: Hightouch launches Lifecycle Studio to reinvent lifecycle marketing with agentic AI

headline: Rokt mParticle launches an audience agent claiming big ad match-rate gains
for_amperity: A direct competitor is selling autonomous audience building with match uplift numbers attached, which is our accuracy story told their way.
posture: We could share our own match numbers with a clear methodology, so the comparison rests on evidence.

cluster.title: Rokt mParticle launches Performance Engine led by Audience Agent
Rokt mParticle launches Performance Engine

headline: Treasure Data rebrands as Treasure AI and repositions as an agentic platform
for_amperity: A top-five CDP just abandoned the category label, confirming the budget is moving from CDP to agentic customer experience.
posture: Feels right to hold our own line here and keep selling the identity substrate, rather than chase the rebrand.

cluster.title: So long Treasure Data, welcome Treasure AI

headline: Snowflake says Claude in Cortex is its fastest growing product ever
for_amperity: Enterprises are adopting governed AI on the data platform at record pace, which is exactly the surface AmpAI needs to meet.
posture: A nice window to put the Cortex integration proof point forward while adoption is the story.

Snowflake and Anthropic accelerate enterprise AI adoption driven by rising demand for governed AI

headline: Marriott rolls out Ask Bonvoy, an AI trip planner grounded in loyalty data

posture: Could be a good conversation to take to our top travel accounts as a reference pattern.

headline: Databricks agrees to buy Panther Labs, its third security acquisition
for_amperity: The lakehouse keeps buying adjacent categories, and customer data infrastructure sits inside its acquisition radius.
posture: Worth refreshing the acquirer map with Databricks a notch higher, and quietly thinking through what we would want if a call ever came.

headline: EU deal delays high-risk AI Act duties to late 2027; transparency still lands in August
for_amperity: Enterprise buyers get regulatory breathing room on AI deployments, but the transparency rules arriving next month still favor governed data.
posture: The August transparency date could fold naturally into the trust conversation for EU-exposed accounts.

headline: Airship names LiveRamp veteran Laura Zwahlen chief revenue officer

posture: Might be worth adding Zwahlen to the list for the activation partnerships review.

posture: Study the Genie Ontology pattern for AmpAI grounding before our next roadmap review.

headline: Connecticut privacy law expands July 1 with LLM training disclosure duties
for_amperity: State law now asks brands whether personal data trains models, which makes governed identity a compliance answer, not just a marketing one.
posture: Brief the field on the disclosure question so it lands as our setup, not our surprise.

posture: Bring the merged-file identity story to the DICK'S account team while integration budgets are open.

headline: Home Depot grows sales 4.8 percent and holds guidance despite housing pressure

posture: Anchor the renewal conversation in measured lifetime value rather than new module expansion.

headline: Enterprise AI buyers shift from token volume to efficiency, pressuring model vendors

posture: Stress-test AmpAI pricing against an efficiency-minded buyer before the fall selling season.
